app.title: Crop Recommendation System
app.subtitle: Smart farming decisions powered by AI analysis

form.title: Soil & Environmental Parameters
form.description: Enter your field's measurements to get personalized crop recommendations

results.noSuitable: ⚠ No Suitable Crop Under Current Conditions
results.clickToView: Click a crop to view details above
results.rankedByLeast: Ranked by least unsuitability — corrective measures advised
results.unsuitableWarningAll: Environmental conditions are highly unsuitable for all crops. The following is the least unsuitable option, but corrective measures are strongly advised.
results.unsuitableWarningMost: Environmental conditions are highly unsuitable for most crops. The following are the least unsuitable options, but corrective measures are strongly advised.
results.noRecommendations: No recommendations available. Please try again.
results.aboutSuitable: Based on your soil nutrients and environmental conditions, {{crop}} is the best suited crop with a {{confidence}}% confidence match.
results.aboutUnsuitable: Current conditions are outside the ideal range for most crops. {{crop}} is the least unsuitable option with a {{confidence}}% confidence match. Consider corrective measures before cultivation.

stress.description: Measures deviation from ideal growing conditions. Higher stress reduces confidence and may trigger tier downgrades.

disclaimer: This AI advisory is based on provided environmental parameters. Consult local agricultural experts before final decision.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Crop Recommendation System • Empowering farmers with data-driven decisions

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Our intelligent system analyzes your soil nutrients (N, P, K), environmental conditions (temperature, humidity, rainfall), and soil pH to recommend the most suitable crop for your field.
howItWorks.getStarted: Get started: Fill in the form above with your field measurements and click the submit button to receive personalized crop recommendations along with cultivation tips and expected yield information.

errors.title: Error
errors.serverHint: Make sure the backend server is reachable. If you're running locally, ensure Django is started.
